properties.displayName: This is an early preview for building Agents with Microsoft Agent 365 and n8n. You need to be part of the Frontier preview program to get early access to Microsoft Agent 365. Learn more
properties.name: previewNotice
systemPrompt
properties.placeholder: e.g. You are a friendly assistant that helps people find a weather forecast for a given time and place.

properties.displayName: Connect an output parser on the canvas to specify the output format you require
properties.name: notice

properties.displayName: Connect an additional language model on the canvas to use it as a fallback if the main model fails
properties.name: fallbackNotice

properties.displayName: Enable Microsoft Work IQ Tools for A365
properties.name: useMcpTools
properties.description: Whether to allow the agent to use Microsoft MCP tools like Calendar, Email, and OneDrive to assist in completing tasks. Requires appropriate permissions in your Microsoft account.

options.name: maxIterations
options.description: The maximum number of iterations the agent will run before stopping

options.name: welcomeMessage
options.placeholder: e.g. Hello! I'm here to help you!
options.default: Hello! I'm here to help you!

definitions.name: @n8n/n8n-nodes-langchain.microsoftAgent365Trigger
